message:
Token optimizer: PNG compression with per-message coloring

- Switch from GIF to PNG for better compression
- Add per-character role coloring (blue=user, green=assistant, yellow=system, red=tool, purple=result)
- Add visible whitespace indicators (| for newline, > for tab) in gray #CCC
- Parse full messages array with tool_use/tool_result handling
- Keep tool pairs intact to avoid API errors
- Split large text into multiple ~1024x1024 images
- Add /health endpoint
- Clean logging: show dimensions, tokens, savings %
- Single user message with images + instruction text
- Move token_optimizer build to its own directory (has zigimg dep)
